code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut seen = "\n"
mut count = 0
mut start = -1
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let opt = string.byte_at(input, i)
  match opt
  when Some(b)
    if is_ws(b)
      if start >= 0
        let token = string.substring(input, start, i)
        let key = "\n#{token}\n"
        if not string.contains(seen, key)
          seen = "#{seen}#{token}\n"
          count = count + 1
        end
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
  when None
    i = n
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start >= 0
  let token = string.substring(input, start, n)
  let key = "\n#{token}\n"
  if not string.contains(seen, key)
    count = count + 1
  end
end
println("unique=#{count}")
